opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I haven't peed since yesterday morning, my bladder feels like it's going to explode, and the pain is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Unable to pass urine for 14 hours with severe lower abdominal pain.

symptom_narrative.onset: unable to void for the past 14 hours
symptom_narrative.character: constant intense urge to urinate with severe suprapubic pain
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to hold on/attempting to pass urine unsuccessfully
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: some slight continuous dribbling in the last hour despite not being able to voluntarily urinate
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: gradually worsening urinary symptoms (hesitancy, weak stream, getting up at night) over the last 6 months, but never a complete blockage before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: pacing, extremely distressed, sweating from the pain

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: cold and flu tablets (contains a decongestant)
current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: started a couple of days ago

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone, no one else home to help

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants urgent pain relief and to be able to urinate

access_barriers.transport: lives alone, in significant pain, may need help arranging transport
